content.en:
"Father, the Xuanxu Holy Realm has given birth to a holy relic!"

Ye Xingchen saw Ye Tian and reported.

"Born a holy relic?"

Ye Tian was not very surprised, but he was pleasantly surprised.

It is true that the Holy Realm will give birth to holy relics, but it is difficult to say when they will give birth to holy relics.

For example, in the ordinary holy realm, it will take a long time for one or two holy relics to be born.

And not long after the birth of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, it also gave birth to holy relics, which is enough to show that the Xuanxu Holy Realm is very extraordinary.

"Father, this is the holy thing!"

Ye Xingchen took out the Golden Light Tower.

Ye Tian could roughly identify the level of this holy relic at a glance, it was just a relatively ordinary holy relic.

"Next, let the human race pay more attention, the Xuanxu Holy Realm is very extraordinary, I am afraid that more holy relics will be born in the future, and these holy relics must remain in the human race!" Ye Tian reminded.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

In the following days, there were indeed more and more treasures born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and they became more and more precious, although no more holy relics were born in a short period of time, but the forbidden treasures were born a lot, and many special treasures were born, which helped the Domain Ancestor a lot.

Moreover, some treasures that can assist in the cultivation of the Holy Body have also been born.

Actually, this is not possible in the ordinary Holy Realm.

But the Xuanxu Holy Realm was promoted because of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, in fact, under the effect of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, the Xuanxu Holy Realm is still growing, but it takes a long time to grow to the Ancestral Realm.

It is precisely because it has been growing that the Xuanxu Holy Realm has been able to continuously give birth to these precious treasures.

this day.

The birth of a treasure land even attracted Ye Tian's attention, and he was out of the customs.

Xuanxu Holy Realm, a new world.

At this time, a large number of Terran Domain Ancestors and Half-Step Domain Ancestors gathered here, and even some Domain Ancestors of other forces also came here, but they did not enter this world.

Because this world has been sealed off by the Terrans, no one is allowed to enter.

Perhaps those top domain ancestors could ignore these human domain ancestors, but no one dared to ignore Ye Tian.

If they dared to trespass and anger Ye Tian, they would be dead.

Therefore, these domain ancestors are very honest, they only watch the excitement, but they dare not break into this world.

In fact, they didn't know much about the situation in this world, only that the Terran Domain Ancestor had gained great benefits from this nascent world, and it was an unimaginable treasure land, but the specific situation was blocked.

Wow!

Ye Tian tore the void and descended.

"I've seen the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

"I've seen the Alliance Leader!"

Everyone said respectfully.

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately entered this nascent world.

And some of the Terran's domain ancestors also entered it, but only a few were allowed to enter.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, after we discovered this nascent world, we immediately sealed it down!"

A Terran domain ancestor said.

Ye Tian's divine sense swept this nascent world, and immediately made judgments in many ways to determine the situation in this world.

To outsiders, this world is very strange, the whole world is composed of a special white crystal, and there are countless black shadows in the void, somewhat similar to the visual and auditory hallucinations of the Dark Forbidden Realm.

However, this is not a visual and auditory hallucination, but a real shadow.

These shadows will constantly attack the souls of the domain ancestors, but this attack is similar to soul refining, if you can withstand the attack of a large number of black shadows, the effect of soul refining will be very good.

The closer to the world's loyalty, the greater the number of black shadows, and even ordinary domain ancestors would find it difficult to enter the center of the world, otherwise their souls would be torn apart by black shadows.

Other than that.

Some treasures were born in this world, such as a crystal flower not far away.

Ordinary people may not know this flower, but Ye Tian does.

It is recorded in the battle gate that this is a soul crystal holy flower that can greatly increase the soul of the domain ancestor, and can even assist in the cultivation of some soul secret arts.

In short, it is very useful.

"This world should be the Soul Saint Realm, a very rare treasure land in the Dark Sacred Domain, and there are not many Soul Saint Realms in the entire Dark Sacred Realm, almost all of them are controlled by the Holy Land and the Ten Holy Gates!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The Soul Saint Realm is very important to the Domain Ancestors, and it is the most important place to refine the soul.

The point is that if a domain ancestor refines his soul in a soul saint realm, the effect will gradually deteriorate over time.

Once a Soul Saint Realm has no effect on a Domain Ancestor, if you want to continue refining your soul, you must go to other Soul Saint Realms.

Therefore, if the Ten Great Saints and the geniuses of the Holy Land wanted to go to other Soul Saint Realms to refine their souls, they almost all had to pay a great price.

The Soul Saint Realm can refine the souls of the ancestors of the Realm, but its most precious treasure is the Soul Saint Realm Flower, and it will take almost countless years for a Soul Saint Realm to give birth to a Soul Saint Realm Flower.

The greatest use of the Soul Saint Realm Flower is to help the Supreme Domain Ancestor to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm, and the reason why the Supreme Domain Ancestor is difficult to advance to the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm is not only because it is difficult for the Supreme Domain Body to transform into an Invincible Domain Ancestor, but also because it has huge requirements for the soul.

If the Supreme Domain Ancestor wants to be promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, the soul must grow to the extreme and give birth to the Soul Holy Light.

Invincible Domain, Soul Light.

These two conditions are the necessary conditions for promotion to the Invincible Domain Ancestor!

Therefore, there are many Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, but the number of Invincible Domain Ancestors has decreased sharply, because it is too difficult to make souls generate Soul Holy Light.

For example, the hundreds of thousands of giant city-level forces in the Dark Sacred Domain, some of the giant-level forces are very powerful, and even have many supreme domain ancestors, but it is difficult to give birth to an invincible domain ancestor, that is, there is no way to give birth to soul holy light.

And it is much easier for the Ten Holy Gates and Holy Lands to give birth to Invincible Domain Ancestors, because they have a lot of treasures that can help the Supreme Domain Ancestor break through, and one of the treasures is the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

A single Soul Saint Realm Flower is enough to create an Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Because of this, the Soul Saint Realm is very precious in the Dark Sacred Realm.

"It will take a long time for the Soul Saint Realm Flower to be born, and the Ten Great Holy Gates may not necessarily have a Soul Saint Realm Flower, once it is really born, it will inevitably be used up as soon as possible. This Soul Saint Realm of the Xuanxu Saint Realm is afraid that it will be difficult to give birth to the Soul Saint Realm Flower now, and it will take a long time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, even if the Soul Saint Realm Flower is not born now, its value is unimaginable, it can allow the ancestors of the human race to enter here to refine the soul, and the hope of breaking through in the future will be much greater, and the time for refining the soul will be reduced.

For example, Ye Tian himself, he usually spends a lot of time refining his soul, but now that he has the Soul Saint Realm, there is no need to give birth to the soul refining problem.

In fact, if he entered the Battle Gate, he could also enter the Soul Saint Realm of the Battle Gate to refine his soul.

But the battle gate is in the Dark Sanctuary, and he won't go to the Dark Sanctuary for the time being, so he can't enjoy that kind of treatment.

But now, if he stays in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he can enjoy such treatment!
